name: Johnny Vegas' Little Shop of Antiques
original_name: Johnny Vegas' Little Shop of Antiques
overview: Johnny Vegas hunts and repairs antiques in a bid to make enough profit to make the shop a permanent business - an emporium on the North West of England.

trailers.title: British Toy Auctions on Jonhny Vegas’s Little Shop of Antiques…
